heading: Injunctions
label: 4405 Injunctions
text: The several district courts of the United States are vested with jurisdiction, for cause shown, to prevent and restrain violations of sections 4402 and 4403 of this title upon application of the Federal Trade Commission in the case of a violation of or upon application of the Attorney General of the United States acting through the several United States attorneys in their several districts in the case of a violation of section 4402 or 4403 of this title.section 4402 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective one year after , see , set out as a note under .Feb. 27, 1986section 11(a) of Pub. L. 99–252section 4401 of this title
